Title: Daewoo 2-in-1 Soup Maker & Smoothie Blender – 1.6l Compact Design, Auto Stir & Overspill Spout – Makes up to 6 Portions of Fresh Soup, Juices & Shakes – Easy Clean
Description:
Fresh Homemade Soup in 20 Minutes – Enjoy hot, comforting soup made from scratch with minimal effort—perfect for quick lunches, cold evenings, or healthy eating at home.
2-in-1 Hot & Cold Functionality – Blend chilled smoothies or heat fresh soups in one compact appliance. Ideal for everything from fruit juices to chunky veg soups.
Smart Automatic Blending – With built-in stir, blend, and heat settings, your meals are made hands-free. Just add ingredients and let it do the work.
Clean & Safe to Use – Overspill spout and auto shut-off help avoid mess, while cool-touch housing keeps hands safe. Great for families and busy cooks.
